content: Working memory capacity limits that bottleneck agent reasoning are not a fixed hardware constraint to be overcome, but an implicit regularization signal that can be leveraged to build more sample-efficient curious active learning agents that hit 2024-2025 SOTA on long-horizon tasks. Instead of endlessly scaling working memory size to improve reasoning, we can tune the rate of memory overflow to encourage the agent to actively prioritize encoding only the highest-outcome novel information aligned with its task goals.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
